scripts.build: bun run build:core && bun run build:react
scripts.verify: bun run build && bun run typecheck && bun run lint && bun run test && bun run check:exports
scripts.release:all: bun run verify && RELIQUARY_RELEASE=1 bun run --filter '@reliquary/event-bus' release:npm && RELIQUARY_RELEASE=1 bun run --filter '@reliquary/event-bus-react' release:npm && RELIQUARY_RELEASE=1 bun run --filter '@reliquary/eslint-config' release:npm && RELIQUARY_RELEASE=1 bun run --filter '@reliquary/eslint-config-react' release:npm
scripts.release:event-bus: bun run verify && RELIQUARY_RELEASE=1 bun run --filter '@reliquary/event-bus' release:npm
scripts.release:event-bus-react: bun run verify && RELIQUARY_RELEASE=1 bun run --filter '@reliquary/event-bus-react' release:npm
scripts.release:eslint-config: bun run verify && RELIQUARY_RELEASE=1 bun run --filter '@reliquary/eslint-config' release:npm
scripts.release:eslint-config-react: bun run verify && RELIQUARY_RELEASE=1 bun run --filter '@reliquary/eslint-config-react' release:npm
